reason_for_decision: The article now defines bounded AI use, evaluation, oversight, safe failure, and auditability clearly enough to pass under the stricter rubric.
strengths: It frames AI as disciplined augmentation rather than vague automation.
The evaluation, drift, and safe-failure sections improve practical governance value.
The article is now much more operationally realistic than the earlier draft.
summary_assessment: This version passes. It is now a credible system-design article for AI-enabled security workflows.
